title: Would you want Funimation to redub the series
display_title: Would you want Funimation to redub the series
wikitext:
[]: Would you want Funimation to redub the series?             Quote Post by Ringworm128 » Sun Sep 23, 2012 7:54 am Would you want Funimation to redub the series with the their rebuild movie cast? I personally would love to see this happen as I prefer Funimations cast over ADV's

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sun Sep 23, 2012 8:02 am No. Won't happen because there wouldn't be any return on investment for the project. Even though I usually prefer subs, I don't mind NGE's English dub, warts and all. I'm curious as to which characters or VAs exactly you (Or anyone else who shares the same thoughts, for that matter) prefer over the originals though.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Sun Sep 23, 2012 8:38 am No. Not because i know who funimation is, but because i don't care for dubs in general.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 23, 2012 10:38 am NOPE

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Sep 23, 2012 10:42 am Dream wrote: No. Not because i know who funimation is, but because i don't care for dubs in general.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Sep 23, 2012 1:15 pm The only redubbing I'd want to see is to fix some of the really awful lines in the first episode or two, along with Yui's "I'm dating Gendo Rokubungi... a lot!! " You know, like ADV should have done when they rereleased the series years ago.

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Sun Sep 23, 2012 1:23 pm I would give a lot to have that moronic "No! This isn't really me!" scene fixed.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sun Sep 23, 2012 1:28 pm Why the hell not? There'd be nothing to lose. (Ain't gonna happen though.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Sep 23, 2012 1:43 pm gatotsu911 wrote: Why the hell not? There'd be nothing to lose. (Ain't gonna happen though.)

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sun Sep 23, 2012 2:20 pm Only if it comes accompanied with a HD video... I've seen some conversions of scenes of The End of Evangelion to 1080p in Youtube and they look pretty darn awesome... I really doubt Gainax doesn't have a digital master to use... (ya, right...)

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Sep 23, 2012 4:23 pm arael wrote: I really doubt Gainax doesn't have a digital master to use... (ya, right...)

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sun Sep 23, 2012 4:25 pm If they do it wont be until the finish Rebuild... They have to keep the Evangelion-originated cash flowing in...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Sep 23, 2012 4:27 pm Yeah, this is pretty much a given; anyway when the time will come we'll probably curse Gainax for losing the masters of episode 16 since it'll be much easier to notice it in HD...

[]:             Quote Post by chazthesilencer » Sun Sep 23, 2012 4:49 pm esselfortium wrote: like ADV should have done when they rereleased the series years ago.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Sep 24, 2012 12:20 pm chazthesilencer wrote: Cut#044 "You don't think it’s brain damage, do you!?" @Topic - Redub the series? I wouldn't want the caves of prehistoric man repainted.

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Mon Sep 24, 2012 12:50 pm NO!

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Sep 24, 2012 3:27 pm BornIn1142 wrote: I would give a lot to have that moronic "No! This isn't really me!" scene fixed.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Sep 24, 2012 5:06 pm Hopefully they redub EoE someday. Hearing rebuild Seele talk about the end of the world would cause bizarre sexual urges.

[]:             Quote Post by Kerath » Tue Sep 25, 2012 12:14 pm I want it redubbed and in HD.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Tue Sep 25, 2012 12:23 pm chazthesilencer wrote: @Topic - Redub the series? I wouldn't want the caves of prehistoric man repainted.
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sun Sep 23, 2012 8:02 am No. Won't happen because there
